candidates.name: voltorb_ko_attack_bonus
candidates.current_behavior: Massive bonus when Voltorb attack can KO opponent active Pokemon
candidates.expected_effect: Tuning could balance between KO aggression and setup completion

candidates.name: voltorb_damage_scaling
candidates.current_behavior: Multiplier converting Voltorb estimated damage to attack score
candidates.expected_effect: Higher = more aggressive attack, lower = more conservative

candidates.name: energy_attack_enablement_bonus
candidates.current_behavior: Bonus when energy attachment enables an immediate attack
candidates.expected_effect: Higher = prioritize attack-enabling attachments more strongly

candidates.name: evolve_first_bellibolt_bonus
candidates.current_behavior: Priority bonus for evolving the first Bellibolt ex (engine setup)
candidates.expected_effect: Higher = evolve earlier, lower = delay for other actions

candidates.name: voltorb_energy_ko_line_bonus
candidates.current_behavior: Bonus when energy attachment reaches opponent KO threshold for Voltorb
candidates.expected_effect: Tuning could sharpen KO targeting via energy placement

candidates.name: turn_rule_legal_attack_score
candidates.current_behavior: Baseline bonus for any legal attack action in turn rule scoring
candidates.expected_effect: Adjusts general attack priority vs other actions

candidates.name: ko_risk_critical_penalty
candidates.current_behavior: Penalty when active Pokemon HP ratio <= 0.25
candidates.expected_effect: Higher = more conservative when near KO

candidates.name: retreat_losing_energy_penalty
candidates.current_behavior: Penalty for retreating when it costs energy
candidates.expected_effect: Tuning balances retreat willingness vs energy loss

candidates.name: voltorb_avoid_attach_when_attack_available
candidates.current_behavior: Penalty for attaching energy when Voltorb can already attack
candidates.expected_effect: Lower = allow pre-attack energy for future, higher = attack first

candidates.name: kilowattrel_ability_large_hand_penalty
candidates.current_behavior: Penalty for using Kilowattrel ability when hand >= 5 cards
candidates.expected_effect: Tuning controls ability usage based on hand size

candidates.name: win_condition_weight
candidates.current_behavior: Scale factor for plan progress in board evaluation
candidates.expected_effect: Higher = weight plan progress more, lower = weight board state more

recommended_next_pr.reason: Single clear value (1000.0), directly impacts KO decisions, easy to externalize, safety metrics catch regressions
